sentences.arabic: افْتَتَحَتِ الْمَدِينَةُ حَدِيقَةً جَدِيدَةً قُرْبَ الْمَدْرَسَةِ.
sentences.translation: Grad je otvorio novi park u blizini škole.
sentences.translationEn: The city opened a new park near the school.

sentences.arabic: تَضُمُّ الْحَدِيقَةُ مَلَاعِبَ لِلأَطْفَالِ وَمَقَاعِدَ لِلرَّاحَةِ.
sentences.translation: Park ima dječija igrališta i klupe za odmor.
sentences.translationEn: The park has playgrounds for children and benches for rest.

sentences.arabic: زَارَ الْحَدِيقَةَ كَثِيرٌ مِنَ الأُسَرِ فِي الْيَوْمِ الأَوَّلِ.
sentences.translation: Mnoge porodice su posjetile park prvog dana.
sentences.translationEn: Many families visited the park on the first day.

sentences.arabic: أَعْرَبَ الأَهَالِي عَنْ سَعَادَتِهِمْ بِهَذِهِ الْهَدِيَّةِ الْجَمِيلَةِ.
sentences.translation: Roditelji su izrazili radost ovim lijepim darom.
sentences.translationEn: The residents expressed their happiness about this beautiful gift.
